title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Revenue Recovery Act, 1890. 1[(2) It extends to the whole of India except 2[the State of Jammu and Kashmir*];] 3*** 4* * * * *
footnote: 1. Subs. by the India (Adaptation of Income-tax, Profits Tax and Revenue Recovery Acts) Order, 1947 (G.G.O. 31, dated the 10th December, 1947) (Gazette of India, 1947, Extraordinary, p. 1333), for sub-section (2). 2. Subs. by Act 33 of 1950, s. 2 and the Schedule, for "Part B States". 3. The word "and" rep. by Act 10 of 1914, s. 3 and the Second Schedule.. 4. Sub-section (3) rep. by s. 3 and the Second Schedule, ibid. *. Vide Notification No. S.O. 3912 (E), dated 30th October, 2019, this Act is made applicable to the Union territory of Jammu and Kashmir and the Union territory of Ladakh.
